title: phinaea parviflora
intro: Phinaea parviflora, also known as the small-flowered phinaea, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae) that is native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phinaea parviflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Phinaea parviflora can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or extract.
